title: Maintain pastures and crops for livestock production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain pastures and crops for livestock production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor and assess agricultural pasture and crop condition, growth and requirements

pcs.text: Monitor pasture and crop growth, nutrient status and health, and record observations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor pasture and crop growth, nutrient status and health, and record observations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor pasture and crop growth, nutrient status and health, and record observations.

pcs.text: Report deviation from expected growth and vigour
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report deviation from expected growth and vigour?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report deviation from expected growth and vigour.

pcs.text: Identify, monitor and report weeds, pests and diseases
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, monitor and report weeds, pests and diseases?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, monitor and report weeds, pests and diseases.

pcs.text: Monitor soil fertility and plant nutrition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor soil fertility and plant nutrition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor soil fertility and plant nutrition.

pcs.text: Establish sites for regular measurement of soil moisture as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish sites for regular measurement of soil moisture as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish sites for regular measurement of soil moisture as directed.

pcs.text: Measure moisture levels and calculate soil water percentage using soil probe or other measuring tools
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure moisture levels and calculate soil water percentage using soil probe or other measuring tools?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure moisture levels and calculate soil water percentage using soil probe or other measuring tools.

pcs.text: Report observations of pasture and crop ripening to supervisor or farm owner to determine the timing of harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report observations of pasture and crop ripening to supervisor or farm owner to determine the timing of harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report observations of pasture and crop ripening to supervisor or farm owner to determine the timing of harvest.

indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
